case_overview: This settlement agreement, executed on July 22, 2024, establishes the terms and conditions between Michael James Ross and Pearson Specter Litt LLP [SOURCE: settlement_agreement.pdf, Page 1].
key_facts: A settlement amount of $450,000 is to be paid in three equal installments [SOURCE: settlement_agreement.pdf, Page 1].
Any disputes arising from the agreement shall be resolved through binding arbitration [SOURCE: settlement_agreement.pdf, Page 1].
Both parties acknowledge that they have read and understood the terms set forth in the agreement [SOURCE: settlement_agreement.pdf, Page 1].
timeline: • July 22, 2024: Settlement agreement executed [SOURCE: settlement_agreement.pdf, Page 1].
jurisdiction: State of New York [SOURCE: settlement_agreement.pdf, Page 1]
